title: Containerize Your R Project
text: containr helps researchers containerize R projects. core function, generate_dockerfile(), analyzes project’s environment dependencies via renv.lock generates ready--use Dockerfile — analyses can reliably shared, archived, rerun across systems.

title: Containerize Your R Project
text: can install containr CRAN: install development version GitHub:

title: Containerize Your R Project
text: common ways use generate_dockerfile():
code: library(containr)  # Generate a Dockerfile with the latest R version and renv.lock dependencies generate_dockerfile()  # Specify a particular R version generate_dockerfile(r_version = "4.3.0")  # Use an RStudio Server image generate_dockerfile(r_mode = "rstudio")  # Print progress messages during generation generate_dockerfile(verbose = TRUE)  # Add explanatory comments to the generated Dockerfile generate_dockerfile(comments = TRUE)

title: Containerize Your R Project
text: cite containr publications:

title: Containerize Your R Project
text: Apache License (>= 2) © Erwin Lares

title: containr: Containerize Your 'R' Project — containr-package
text: Provides tools containerizing 'R' projects. core function, 'generate_dockerfile()', analyzes 'R' project's environment dependencies via 'renv' lock file generates ready--use 'Dockerfile' encapsulates computational setup. Designed help researchers build portable, reproducible workflows can reliably shared, archived, rerun across systems. See R Core Team (2025) https://www.R-project.org/, Ushey et al. (2025) https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=renv, Docker Inc. (2025) https://www.docker.com/.

title: containr: Containerize Your 'R' Project — containr-package
text: Maintainer: Erwin Lares erwin.lares@wisc.edu (ORCID)

what: Retrieve Docker tags for a Rocker image — .get_r_ver_tags
title: Retrieve Docker tags for a Rocker image — .get_r_ver_tags
text: Queries Docker Hub API retrieve available tags specified Rocker image. Supports user-friendly modes: "base", "rstudio", "tidyverse". Returns structured list containing image name, tag vector, source URL.

title: Retrieve Docker tags for a Rocker image — .get_r_ver_tags
Retrieve Docker tags for a Rocker image — .get_r_ver_tags
text: r_mode Character string. One "base", "rstudio", "tidyverse". Determines Rocker image query. "base" maps "rocker/r-ver". verbose Logical. TRUE, prints progress messages tag retrieval pagination.

title: Retrieve Docker tags for a Rocker image — .get_r_ver_tags
text: named list following elements: image Character string. full Docker image name, e.g. "rocker/r-ver". tags Character vector. available tags specified image, e.g. c("latest", "devel", "4.4", "4.4.3", ...). source Character string. base URL Docker Hub API used retrieve tags.

what: Check if a specific Rocker image tag exists — .r_ver_exists
title: Check if a specific Rocker image tag exists — .r_ver_exists
text: Validates format version string checks whether exists among available tags specified Rocker image Docker Hub. Supports semantic versioning, CUDA variants, Ubuntu suffixes.

title: Check if a specific Rocker image tag exists — .r_ver_exists
Check if a specific Rocker image tag exists — .r_ver_exists
text: version Character string. tag check existence, e.g. "4.4.0", "devel", "4.4.0-cuda12.2-ubuntu22.04". Must match semantic versioning one "latest", "devel". r_mode Character string. One "base", "rstudio", "tidyverse". Determines Rocker image query. verbose Logical. TRUE, prints messages indicating whether version found.

title: Check if a specific Rocker image tag exists — .r_ver_exists
text: Logical. TRUE specified version tag exists given Rocker image; otherwise FALSE.

title: Validate a file argument — .validate_file_arg
text: Internal helper used generate_dockerfile() check optional file arguments (e.g. data_file, code_file, misc_file) valid.

title: Validate a file argument — .validate_file_arg
text: arg_name Character string, name argument checked (used error messages). value character path file, NULL.

title: Validate a file argument — .validate_file_arg
text: normalized file path validation succeeds, NULL input NULL.

what: Generate a reproducible Dockerfile for an R project — generate_dockerfile
title: Generate a reproducible Dockerfile for an R project — generate_dockerfile
text: generate_dockerfile() inspects R project's dependencies via renv lockfile writes ready--use Dockerfile specified output directory. supports multiple Rocker base images, optional system libraries, Quarto installation, file copying, user creation, inline documentation comments.

title: Generate a reproducible Dockerfile for an R project — generate_dockerfile
code: generate_dockerfile(   verbose = FALSE,   r_version = "current",   data_file = NULL,   code_file = NULL,   misc_file = NULL,   add_user = NULL,   home_dir = "/home",   install_quarto = FALSE,   expose_port = "8787",   r_mode = "base",   install_syslibs = TRUE,   comments = FALSE,   output = tempdir() )

title: Generate a reproducible Dockerfile for an R project — generate_dockerfile
text: verbose Logical. TRUE, prints progress messages section Dockerfile written. Defaults FALSE. r_version character string specifying R version use, e.g. "4.3.0". Defaults "current", resolves version R running current session. data_file character string. Path optional data file copy container /home/data/. Defaults NULL. code_file character string. Path optional script file (e.g. .R, .qmd, .rmd) copy container /home/. Defaults NULL. misc_file character string. Path optional miscellaneous file (e.g. image shell script) copy container /home/. Defaults NULL. add_user character string. Name Linux user create inside container sudo access. Defaults NULL. home_dir character string. working directory set inside container via WORKDIR. Defaults "/home". install_quarto Logical. TRUE, downloads installs Quarto CLI inside container. Defaults FALSE. expose_port character string. port expose r_mode "rstudio". Defaults "8787". r_mode character string selecting Rocker base image. Inspired Rocker Project. One "base" plain R, "tidyverse" R tidyverse, "rstudio" RStudio Server, "tidystudio" tidyverse plus TeX Live publishing-related packages. Defaults "base". install_syslibs Logical. TRUE, installs system libraries commonly required R packages needed source compilation (e.g. libcurl4-openssl-dev, libxml2-dev). Defaults TRUE. comments Logical. TRUE, annotates Dockerfile instruction explanatory comment. Useful learning sharing. Defaults FALSE. output character string. Directory path Dockerfile written. Defaults tempdir().

title: Generate a reproducible Dockerfile for an R project — generate_dockerfile
text: Called side effects. Writes Dockerfile output. return value.

title: Generate a reproducible Dockerfile for an R project — generate_dockerfile
code: # Generate a minimal Dockerfile using a pinned R version generate_dockerfile(r_version = "4.4.0", output = tempdir())  # Pin a specific R version with the tidyverse image generate_dockerfile(r_version = "4.3.0", r_mode = "tidyverse", output = tempdir())  # Include a data file and annotate the Dockerfile with comments if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ generate_dockerfile(   r_version = "4.3.0",   data_file = "data/penguins.csv",   comments  = TRUE,   output    = "." ) } # }

title: containr 0.1.3
text: CRAN release: 2026-04-26

title: containr 0.1.3
text: Internal helpers renamed dot prefix: get_r_ver_tags() → .get_r_ver_tags(), r_ver_exists() → .r_ver_exists(), validate_file_arg() → .validate_file_arg(). user-facing change enforces package convention internal functions. tidystudio added valid r_mode generate_dockerfile(), .get_r_ver_tags(), .r_ver_exists(). Maps rocker/verse.

title: containr 0.1.3
text: generate_dockerfile(): replaced stop() print() / Sys.sleep() calls cli::cli_abort() cli::cli_inform() throughout consistent, styled error progress messages. generate_dockerfile(): fixed comments condition Quarto block quarto_install_line == TRUE install_quarto. generate_dockerfile(): fixed comments conditions code_file misc_file blocks check correct variables. generate_dockerfile(): RStudio run instructions split two cleaner comment lines. .get_r_ver_tags(): replaced stopifnot() cli::cli_abort() message() cli::cli_inform(). Removed bare return() final list expression. .r_ver_exists(): replaced stop() cli::cli_abort() message() cli::cli_inform(). .validate_file_arg(): replaced stop() cli::cli_abort().

title: containr 0.1.2
text: CRAN release: 2026-04-07 Added inst/CITATION DOI proper academic citation via citation("containr") Added inst/WORDLIST spell check consistency Added Language: en-US DESCRIPTION Improved documentation README Added rhub v2 GitHub Actions workflow cross-platform checks

title: containr 0.1.1
text: CRAN release: 2025-09-24

title: containr 0.1.0
text: Initial CRAN submission.
